Step.name: Mixed — Retract authorises criticality downgrade AND retires superseded Concluding
Step.Goal: Kernel goal whose criticality was reclassified mid-run.
Step.Concluding: REFER:F_01 — original close on the kernel chain.

Retract.reason: criticality reclassified to bridge after impact-scoping observation

Step.Concluding: REFER:F_01 — new bridge-level close after the reclassification.
